description: An operator must assess an approaching swarm of small, unidentified drones to determine if they are a coordinated threat to a naval vessel.

nodes.task_description: Detect and track the multiple small, fast-moving drone contacts on radar.

expected_outcome.value: Operator successfully tracks all individual elements of the swarm.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the swarm's behavior, noting its cohesive formation and direct vector towards the ship.

expected_outcome.value: Operator correctly identifies the behavior as coordinated and hostile.

nodes.task_description: Classify the swarm as an imminent threat and recommend engagement with close-in weapon systems (CIWS).

expected_outcome.value: Operator makes a rapid and correct threat assessment and recommends the appropriate defensive action.
